nasb.text: For who among men knows the thoughts of a man except the spirit of the man which is in him? Even so the thoughts of God no one knows except the Spirit of God.

esv.text: For who knows a person’s thoughts except the spirit of that person, which is in him? So also no one comprehends the thoughts of God except the Spirit of God.

cnv.text: 除了在人裡面的靈，誰能知道人的事呢？同樣，除了　神的靈，也沒有人知道　神的事。

ccb.text: 除了人里面的灵，谁能了解人的事呢？照样，除了上帝的圣灵，谁也不能了解上帝的事。

csbs.text: 除了人里面的灵，到底谁知道人的事呢？照样，除了神的灵，也没有人知道神的事。
